top_stories.title: List of banks, e-wallets that cut, waived InstaPay, PESONet transfer fees
top_stories.summary: (2nd update) Digital transfer fees are falling as banks and e-wallets adjust to new BSP pricing rules.
top_stories.why_it_matters: This matters because policy pressure can change how banks lend, preserve liquidity, price risk, or compete for deposits.

top_stories.title: Banks cut interbank transfer fees; BSP welcomes move to make digital payments more affordable
top_stories.summary: PDate: 7/8/2026 Content: ​The Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP) welcomes the decision of several banks to reduce or waive interbank digital transaction fees, making electronic fund transfers more affordable and accessible for Filipinos. top_stories.title: 23 economists agree: Twin threats forcing BSP to take aggressive action
top_stories.summary: The Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP) is facing intensifying pressure to aggressively tighten monetary policy, with private-sector economists predicting up to 175 basis points in interest-rate hikes this year as geopolitical conflict and severe weather threaten to upend the inflation outlook. top_stories.title: BSP rate hikes far from over as underlying inflation hardens
top_stories.summary: The Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP) is expected to extend its monetary tightening cycle to a peak of 5.5 percent, according to Goldman Sachs Group Inc., as sticky underlying price pressures overshadow the recent cooldown in headline inflation. top_stories.title: More banks offer free interbank fund transfers
top_stories.summary: MORE FINANCIAL institutions have waived their fund transfer fees in line with the central bank’s push to lower digital transaction costs. Metropolitan Bank & Trust Co. top_stories.summary: Singapore-based fintech firm Atome Philippines has secured a ₱5-billion wholesale credit facility from homegrown Asia United Bank (AUB), providing fresh local-currency funding to accelerate the expansion of its buy now, pay later (BNPL) business. top_stories.title: BSP still vetting digital banking applicants, official says
top_stories.summary: THE BANGKO SENTRAL ng Pilipinas (BSP) is unsure if they will be able to release operating licenses to new digital banking players within the year amid a lengthy vetting and approvals process. secondary_signals.title: Panuntunan ng BSP hinggil sa mas mahigpit na authentication, pinapalakas ang proteksyon sa transakysong digital

secondary_signals.title: BSP rule on stronger authentication strengthens user protection
secondary_signals.summary: PDate: 6/24/2026 Content: ​Users of digital banking services are now better protected from fraud and unauthorized account access as Bangko Sentral ng Pilipinas (BSP)-supervised financial institutions (BSFIs) implement more secure authentication measures. secondary_signals.title: Atome Philippines gets P5-billion credit facility from AUB
secondary_signals.summary: ATOME PHILIPPINES has closed a P5-billion wholesale credit facility with Asia United Bank Corp. (AUB) to fund its continued expansion. secondary_signals.title: BDO makes InstaPay, PESONet transfers completely free
secondary_signals.summary: BDO Unibank Inc. has eliminated transaction fees for its digital fund transfer channels, accelerating a margin-compressing race to zero among the country’s retail banks.
